digest.greeting: Wednesday, June 17, Jean. Today is anchored by the 9:30 AM TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint, the Santiago/Sara 1:1 run before lunch, and the 2:00 PM EPMO Team Meeting. Outlook shows 5 meetings plus 2 protected/focus blocks, with 2 carried-over items and 2 active reminders. The priorities are to answer Sara's CoE leadership metrics ask, keep the Venn ticket escalation moving, sharpen Staff Aug ownership language, and decide what needs to be ready for Friday's EPMO presentation. Teams broad-thread discovery returned a Microsoft Graph 403, so the Teams readout uses unread chats and targeted message pulls only.

items.label: Collect Venn ticket numbers for one escalation path
items.detail: This is still the cleanest unresolved escalation path from the prior daily digest. Collect each TM's Venn ticket number, current blocker, and whether Venn is threatening closure so Danny, Nico, or IT have one consolidated view instead of separate partial threads.

items.label: Confirm Sara's CoE leadership metrics by 10 AM ET
items.detail: Sara asked for CoE metrics for a leadership meeting this morning, including start date, sprint count, completed/active/pending totals, Halo-ticket delivery, IT-project delivery, and notable wins. Mar posted the core numbers overnight; Jean should make sure the answer is complete and leadership-ready before the morning deadline.

items.label: Respond to Sara's important message
items.detail: Overnight dashboard reminder: "Responder mensaje de Sara - importante." This matches Sara's Teams ask for CoE metrics by 10 AM ET. Mar supplied draft figures: CoE began April 15, completed three sprints, and shows 17 completed, 6 active, and 25 queued projects, with 2 Halo tickets, 11 IT projects, and 4 completed without IT implementation.

items.label: Prepare the Friday EPMO presentation
items.detail: Overnight dashboard reminder: "Preparar presentación para Reunión del Viernes sobre presentar EPMO." Use today's focus time to decide the storyline, the proof points from Sara's CoE metrics request, and any Staff Aug or Detention Prevention updates that should be included. This one-shot reminder will archive after today's digest.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The strongest prep window is the 12:00-1:30 PM blocked space; after 2:00 PM the calendar is fragmented by EPMO, Maria, and weekly-meeting prep.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: Short but important. Bring the open Staff Aug ownership question, Rippling/M365 integration scope, and whether the risk language is ready for leadership.

items.label: 1:1 Santiago & Jean
items.detail: Use as a quick operating check before Sara. Good place to confirm any portfolio or CoE numbers that need a second read.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: Best live forum to close the leadership metrics ask and align on what should be framed as a win, risk, or escalation.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected 90-minute block. Use it for the Friday EPMO presentation, Venn ticket consolidation, and Staff Aug talking points before the afternoon meeting block starts.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Operational update forum for project spotlights, completed initiatives, new initiatives, and EPMO guidance. Useful if CoE metrics, Venn, or Staff Aug need a wider update.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda includes portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Bring any item that needs a named owner instead of another broad discussion.

items.label: Focus time: weekly meeting preparation
items.detail: Protect this for Thursday and Friday prep, especially the EPMO presentation and any Staff Aug follow-up needed before tomorrow's dedicated meeting.

items.label: Turn Staff Aug risk into a clear ask
items.detail: Today's Staff Aug touchpoint needs a precise outcome: confirm the IT owner, validate the Rippling/M365 integration scope, and decide whether the executive framing should be a win, a risk, or an escalation. Tomorrow's Staff Aug - Next Steps meeting has the broader IT audience, so today's prep should make that meeting usable.

items.label: Track Detention Prevention approvals before pilot development
items.detail: Jhara closed the Detention Prevention market research phase and moved the work into pilot development under the working name ICE Preparedness Plan. The deck still needs sign-off from IT/Data, Marketing, and Legal owners. Decide whether Jean needs to prompt the approval owners or simply monitor before Friday's stakeholder meeting.

items.label: Confirm next PM Workshop ownership and timing
items.detail: In the PM Workshop chat, Jean named Jhara and Mar as leads for the next workshop: Jhara on project-management methods and perspectives, and Mar on the execution-guide skill. Jean also told Jhara to schedule it for next week; confirm the meeting gets placed and that the intended output is clear.

items.label: Reply to Craft.io with beta access scope
items.detail: Thomas from Craft.io said Jean was selected for the MCP beta and asked for the specific Workspaces or Feedback Portals the read-only token should cover. This is a direct reply ask, but it is external and should be answered only after confirming which resources Jean actually wants exposed.

items.label: Use Andrea's Litify field-audit steps if the queue field question continues
items.detail: Andrea sent step-by-step Teams guidance for checking who created or last modified a Litify field through Setup, Object Manager, Fields & Relationships, and the field detail page. Keep it handy if the Queue / User Name field ownership question comes back into today's portfolio or Phase 2 conversations.

items.label: 1:1 Andrea and Jean
items.detail: Useful follow-up spot for the Litify field-audit guidance and any USCIS taskset/UAT questions still open.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Good prep block before BCP/Incident Response and the afternoon run.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Bring any survey, follow-up, or risk items that need to stay visible after this week's portfolio updates.

items.label: Staff Augmentation - Next Steps
items.detail: Nadia's invite frames this as the broader unblock conversation with IT. Today's Staff Aug prep should feed directly into this meeting.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Team coordination forum for roadblocks, workshop follow-through, and EPMO operating updates.

reminderHistory.text: Seguimiento a stakeholders de Co-counsel network project. Go/no-go?
Hacer follow up con HR para resultados de la survey
Responder al correo de Eugenia para Danny sobre problemas con Venn
Seguimiento a David para la creación del COE playbook
solicitar a TMs los numeros de sus tickets de IT relacionados a Venn
Preparar presentación para Reunión del Viernes sobre presentar EPMO
